description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global before_script to create a build directory, set CXXFLAGS=-Werror and enable CTest failure output. Define six jobs: arch, buster, and stretch each run on their respective images (registry.gitlab.com/eidheim/docker-images:arch, :buster, :stretch) and execute the shared script which runs cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .. && make && make test, then removes all files, then runs cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DUSE_STANDALONE_ASIO=ON .. && make && make test. Add a static-analysis job on the arch image that runs scan-build cmake .. && scan-build --status-bugs make. Add a thread-safety-analysis job on the arch image that runs CXX=clang++ cmake .. && make. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch using the alpine image, installs doxygen, builds documentation with doxygen docs/Doxyfile, moves the generated html to a public/ directory, and publishes public/ as a pages artifact. All jobs use the default stage.
